hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Leave The Office Early Day, a fun musical like Hairspray will get you in the mood to cut out of work and dance the day away, just like the energetic characters in this film.
hero.blurb: With its lighthearted humor and catchy soundtrack, Hairspray is the perfect pick-me-up to help you leave your worries behind. The all-star cast brings this musical to life with their charm and talent. It's a fun, upbeat film that will leave you smiling.

released.title: Mr. Brooks
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Mr. Brooks is a psychological thriller that explores the darker side of human nature, featuring a tour-de-force performance from Kevin Costner.
released.blurb: This gripping film will keep you on the edge of your seat as it delves into the mind of a serial killer. With its unexpected twists and turns, Mr. Brooks is a must-see for fans of the thriller genre.

birthday.title: Sleepless in Seattle
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Bruce Willis was not born today but,  Angela Kinsey was not born today either, however,  Bruce Dern was not, however Happy birthday to Bruce Dern, born June 4, 1936, and this classic rom-com showcases his talent in a supporting role.
birthday.blurb: This iconic film is a beautiful love story that will capture your heart. With its witty dialogue and memorable performances, Sleepless in Seattle is a timeless classic that will leave you feeling warm and fuzzy inside.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever is infamous for its incoherent plot, poor acting, and cringe-worthy dialogue, making it a hilariously bad movie that's so bad it's good.
awful.blurb: This action film is a masterclass in how not to make a movie, with its nonsensical storyline and over-the-top performances. It's a trainwreck that you can't look away from, and its absurdity makes it oddly entertaining.
